events.label: assistant
events.text:
Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`.

**Summary:** A dry-type/pad-mount transformer secondary is a separately derived system (SDS) under NEC 250.30, requiring a system bonding jumper linking the grounded (neutral) conductor to the equipment grounding conductor/enclosure at one point, plus a grounding electrode connection. The missing secondary bonding jumper observed at rough-complete stage is a code violation that leaves the system without an effective ground-fault current path — a shock/equipment-damage hazard if energized. Result: **fail, high risk**, with corrective action to install the bonding jumper and grounding electrode connection and reinspect before covering or energizing.
